caption: Lena Vortex drifts through the neon‑lit cyberpunk backstreet, her sleek bodysuit glimmering against rain‑soaked asphalt as she navigates the midnight haze. She flaunts her ample curves, a daring silhouette that commands the night. Her crew of drones follows her, weaving through the electric glow of holographic billboards ⚡💜
